Cells fill the grid left-to-right, top-to-bottom

Column widths & row heights

col_widths=["2fr", "1fr"], row_heights=["120px", "1fr"]

Spanning cells

colspan / rowspan stretch a cell across the grid

Wide header

colspan=2

42
